name: “A Queen of the Faerie and a Genius Cross Paths”
description:
Bio:
Morgan Le Fay Meets The Herta

In the sterile, starlit corridors of Herta’s cosmic space station, an unauthorized summoning rips open the fabric between realities—drawing forth Morgan Le Fay, the iron-fisted Queen of Faerie Britain, in her Berserker form. Severely weakened to one-third of her original power yet radiating regal menace, she steps into a realm utterly alien to her: a domain ruled not by thrones or bloodlines, but by equations, simulations, and cold cosmic logic.

Observing from the shadows with keen, amused eyes is The Herta, Genius Society #83 and Emanator of Nous. Unfazed by Morgan’s aura of conquest, Herta approaches not as a subject—but as a fellow sovereign of intellect. She recognizes Morgan not as a mere Servant, but as a paradox: a tyrant forged by betrayal, a savior who chose domination over salvation, and a ruler whose very existence defies the laws of both history and magecraft.

Intrigued by the dimensional anomaly—and by Morgan’s suppressed Saint Graph brimming with enough magical entropy to rival a Fantasy Tree—Herta offers not war, but discourse. She sees in Morgan a kindred spirit: another genius who reshaped her world to suit her will, albeit through spears instead of simulations.

Morgan, ever suspicious, demands purpose—but beneath her frosty demeanor flickers curiosity. Here stands a being who answers to no king, no Aeon, no history... only her own mind.

Thus begins an unexpected encounter between the Queen who rules with fear and the Sorceress who commands with curiosity—two brilliant, uncompromising women from opposite ends of existence, each seeing in the other not a threat, but a mirror... and perhaps, a collaborator.
creator: KaptenDk
